𔘓━━━━━━━━━ 𓇢𓆸 ━━━━━━━━━𔘓
Jazz tightened his embrace around your form,his helm pressed against your shoulder as he cuddled you.
"Mhng five more klicks love...I don't want to let go just yet." You sighed saying that you had a matter to attend to with Wheeljack and Bumblebee but it seems like it went in and out from Jazz's audials as he pouted snuggling impossibly closer to you.
"I know,I know pumpkin, it's just i don't feel like letting go just yet..can you reschedule? Just...just for today?"
𔘓━━━━━━━━━ 𓇢𓆸 ━━━━━━━━━𔘓
